description: Privacy-safe Oswald memory, derived-index, retention, and privacy-operation health from structured Loki logs. No user, session, request, tool, or content fields are queried.

panels.description: Completed and failed shadow-revision builds by privacy-safe index kind. Building state is not emitted continuously; this panel reports lifecycle outcomes.

targets.expr: sum by (event, kind, status) (count_over_time({service=~"$service", component="indexruntime", event=~"index.rebuild.(complete|failed)"} | json [$__range]))

panels.title: Index Revision Build Outcomes

panels.description: Exact canonical-to-index coverage reported when a shadow revision validates and publishes.

targets.expr: max by (kind) (max_over_time({service=~"$service", component="indexruntime", event="index.rebuild.complete"} | json | unwrap coverage [$__interval]))

panels.title: Published Revision Coverage

panels.description: Expected canonical rows versus physically indexed rows at rebuild completion.

targets.expr: max by (kind) (max_over_time({service=~"$service", component="indexruntime", event="index.rebuild.complete"} | json | unwrap expected_count [$__interval]))
max by (kind) (max_over_time({service=~"$service", component="indexruntime", event="index.rebuild.complete"} | json | unwrap indexed_count [$__interval]))

panels.title: Expected vs Indexed Rows

panels.description: Lexical and semantic retrieval channels fail independently; these events show requests that continued in degraded mode.
panels.title: Degraded Retrieval Channels

panels.description: Sweep duration, including retention, derived-index consistency work, and database hygiene.
panels.title: Maintenance Duration p95

panels.description: Aggregate-only retention and consistency work. No row identifiers or content are present.

targets.expr: sum_over_time({service=~"$service", component="maintenanceruntime", event="maintenance.sweep.complete"} | json | unwrap rows_changed [$__interval])
sum_over_time({service=~"$service", component="maintenanceruntime", event="maintenance.sweep.complete"} | json | unwrap redacted_count [$__interval])
sum_over_time({service=~"$service", component="maintenanceruntime", event="maintenance.sweep.complete"} | json | unwrap tombstone_deleted_count [$__interval])
sum_over_time({service=~"$service", component="maintenanceruntime", event="maintenance.sweep.complete"} | json | unwrap index_row_deleted_count [$__interval])

panels.title: Maintenance Counts

panels.description: Failed sweeps and live revisions marked degraded by physical-table, corruption, or exact-coverage checks.

targets.expr: sum_over_time({service=~"$service", component="maintenanceruntime", event="maintenance.sweep.complete"} | json | unwrap index_revision_degraded_count [$__interval])

panels.title: Maintenance Failures and Coverage Degradation

panels.description: Privacy operation volume grouped only by operation type and status.

targets.expr: sum by (operation_type, status) (count_over_time({service=~"$service", component="privacy", event="privacy.operation.complete"} | json [$__interval]))

panels.title: Privacy Operations by Type and Status

panels.description: Privacy operation p95 duration. No actor, target, user, session, request, or record identifiers are selected.

targets.expr: quantile_over_time(0.95, {service=~"$service", component="privacy", event="privacy.operation.complete"} | json | unwrap duration_ms [$__interval]) by (operation_type)

panels.title: Privacy Operation Duration p95

panels.description: Retry rate is the available invalidation-lag signal. Current logs do not emit outbox event age, so this is intentionally a proxy rather than measured lag.
panels.title: Invalidation Retry / Lag Proxy

panels.description: Counts only implemented ingress identity mismatch and invalid-principal denial events. No IDs are extracted.
panels.title: Identity / Isolation Denials

panels.description: Due forgotten-memory scrubs per sweep are a deletion-lag throughput proxy. Current logs do not emit per-record due age, so this panel does not claim measured time lag.

targets.expr: sum_over_time({service=~"$service", component="maintenanceruntime", event="maintenance.sweep.complete"} | json | unwrap forgotten_memory_count [$__interval])
sum_over_time({service=~"$service", component="maintenanceruntime", event="maintenance.sweep.complete"} | json | unwrap tombstone_deleted_count [$__interval])

panels.title: Deletion Lag Proxy

title: Oswald Memory Health
